name: Seedless Wallet
description: Seedless Wallet is a passkey-native wallet built on Solana that eliminates seed phrases entirely. Users authenticate using biometrics such as Face ID or fingerprint recognition through the WebAuthn standard. The wallet integrates with the LazorKit SDK for passkey-based key management and uses the Kora Paymaster to sponsor gas fees, making transactions completely free for end users. Seedless Wallet aims to make self-custodial crypto accessible to mainstream users by removing the two biggest barriers to entry: seed phrase management and gas fees.
